Contributions are welcome.

This repository hosts Minghao Ning's academic personal website. To propose updates:

1. Clone the repository.
1. Create a branch off of `master` with a meaningful name.
1. Update the relevant content files, usually `_pages/`, `_publications/`, `_data/navigation.yml`, or `_config.yml`.
1. Build the site locally when possible.
1. Open a pull request and describe the content or configuration changes.
